grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use the System at a specified location under the Brand
grant_and_term.renewal: None. Non-renewable. Re-licensing at sole discretion.

fee_and_payment.payment_method: Wire transfer or electronic funds transfer required
fee_and_payment.set_off_right: Franchisor may reduce any payment/credit by amounts owed by franchisee or affiliates
fee_and_payment.grr_definition: All revenue from guest room sales/rental, loyalty point redemptions, breakfast if included, mandatory guest fees, late cancellation, no-show revenue, credit transactions — less rebates/overcharges, excluding taxes

site_selection_and_construction.site_selection: Franchisor not obligated to assist with locating/purchasing/leasing site
site_selection_and_construction.architect_approval: Must obtain prior written consent for architect, designer, contractor, major subs
site_selection_and_construction.plans_approval: Must obtain approval of all plans, layouts, specifications; cannot start construction until approved; no changes without advance consent
site_selection_and_construction.ada_compliance: Architect must certify plans comply with accessibility laws; ADA consultant may be required
site_selection_and_construction.construction_start_deadline_new: Within 15 months of application approval (with rolling 30-day auto-extensions)

training_obligations.gm_training: GM and commercial leaders must complete training within 90 days of start
training_obligations.replacement_training: Replacements must complete training; hotel cannot go >90 days without qualified person
training_obligations.certification_required: OnQ Rate & Inventory: 80% minimum score; up to 3 staff certified
training_obligations.annual_compliance: Diversity, harassment prevention, human trafficking, cyber security, health & safety

non_curable_immediate: Failure to construct after withdrawal of Shared Facilities consent

transfer_restrictions.general_rule: All transfers prohibited unless expressly permitted
transfer_restrictions.change_of_ownership: Requires 60 days notice, new FA, PIP, $100,000 fee, transferee qualifications
transfer_restrictions.public_offering: 60 days advance notice, $5,000 processing fee, indemnification
transfer_restrictions.mortgages: Generally allowed without consent if sole borrower and single-hotel collateral; otherwise requires consent

default_and_cross_default.cross_default: Termination of any Hotel Agreement (HITS, etc.) based on franchisee breach is non-curable ground for FA termination
default_and_cross_default.lender_default_escalation: Franchisor may require third-party guaranty as condition of curing payment default

noncompete.management_company: Cannot be exclusive manager of a Competitor
noncompete.competitor_definition: Any entity that owns/licenses/franchises a competing hotel brand, regardless of number of hotels
exceptions: Minority owner OK (if no officer/director/employee role and no control)

guaranty.who_signs: Determined case-by-case based on financial review; may include spouse

liquidated_damages.pre_opening_no_work: $10,000 x approved guest rooms (if franchisee/guarantor enters another hotel agreement at site within 1 year)
liquidated_damages.pre_opening_after_work: $10,000 x approved guest rooms (unless excused by Force Majeure)
liquidated_damages.post_opening_before_2yr: Greater of: 60x avg monthly royalty OR $10,000 x rooms
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Avg monthly royalty x remaining months
liquidated_damages.avg_monthly_royalty_calculation: If 24+ months operating: total royalty for prior 24 months / 24. If <24 months: total royalty from opening / months operating. Excludes temporary accommodations and Business Interruptions.

venue_and_dispute.governing_law: New York (without choice of law principles)
venue_and_dispute.venue: ED VA (Alexandria) or Fairfax County, VA state court; NY backup
venue_and_dispute.franchisor_alternate_venue: May sue where hotel is located
venue_and_dispute.puerto_rico: Mandatory AAA/JAMS arbitration; venue Fairfax County, VA; seat New York

insurance.required: Minimum levels and types per Manual
insurance.insurer_ratings: Must meet minimum ratings specified in Manual
insurance.franchisor_right: If franchisee fails to obtain/maintain, franchisor may obtain at franchisee's expense

indemnification.scope: Franchisee must defend, indemnify, and hold harmless franchisor, Hilton Worldwide, subsidiaries, affiliates, and their officers, directors, employees, agents, successors, assigns
indemnification.covers: All claims, demands, taxes, penalties, judicial/administrative proceedings arising from claimed occurrences at Hotel

force_majeure.recognized: Yes — events of Force Majeure excuse certain obligations (e.g., 5-day non-operation, construction delays)
force_majeure.franchisee_obligation: Must take reasonable steps to minimize impact

distinctive_clauses.significance: Franchise is explicitly non-renewable. Re-licensing at sole discretion with potentially materially different terms. Franchisee has no continuity guarantee after 22-year investment.
Brand's principal marks not federally registered. Less legal protection. Potential rebranding risk at franchisee's expense.

distinctive_clauses.clause: All assets pledged as Hilton debt collateral
distinctive_clauses.significance: Franchisor entity's franchise contracts and assets collateralize Hilton corporate debt. Structural subordination risk.
Franchisee cannot own or be franchisor/licensor of any competing hotel brand during term, even a single-hotel brand. Broad restriction.
Franchisor may restrict minimum length of stay for reservations and implement inventory management standards. Controls on revenue strategy.
